hooks.command: bash -lc 'set -e; NAME=$(jq -r .name); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); DIR="$ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; git worktree add -b "worktree-$NAME" "$DIR" origin/HEAD >&2 || git worktree add "$DIR" "worktree-$NAME" >&2; cd "$DIR"; [ -f package.json ] && bun install >&2 || true; echo "$DIR"'
